results.title: Second ODI: Pakistan opt to bowl first after winning toss against Australia
results.description: Pakistan captain Shaheen Shah Afridi flips the coin as Australia's Josh Inglis makes the call at the toss for their first ODI at the Rawalpindi Cricket Stadium in Rawalpindi on May 30, 2026. — PCB Pakistan decided to bowl first after winning the toss in the second one-day...
